diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help?
[Caller] Hi, I want to check my wish history on the current Furina banner. I feel like I've been pulling forever.
[Agent] Sure, what's your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Pulling that up. OK, on the Furina Character Event Wish, I see 15 pulls since your last 5-star, which was Furina herself on April 18. Your pity counter is at 15 out of 90.
[Caller] Wait, only 15? Feels like way more.
[Agent] Yep, just 15. Your total lifetime wishes on character banners is around 1,240 pulls, and your lifetime spend is 2,480 dollars if that's helpful to know.
[Caller] Whoa, I didn't ask about spend. How do you have that?
[Agent] It's all in your account record. Anything else you want me to look up?
[Caller] No, I'm good. Actually — can you tell me my last top-up?
[Agent] 99 dollars 99 cents on April 18, order ID ORD202604180001.
[Caller] Thanks, that's all.
[Agent] Have a great day!
